title: Epic: Life Decisions V1 — PRD Implementation
description: Implement Life Decisions V1 per decisions/lifedecisions/08-prd/document.md. Web app: interactive onboarding, course player (free + paid), Wins Board, auth, payment, progress tracking. Foundation (auth, schema, Stripe, course content) already exists — tasks focus on PRD alignment and new features.

title: Audit existing schema against PRD data model
description:
Compare platform/db/schema.ts against PRD Section 5 data model. Document gaps.
PRD Architectural Prerequisite #2 identifies 5 schema divergences.
FILES: READ platform/db/schema.ts, READ decisions/lifedecisions/08-prd/document.md Section 5.
OUTPUT: list of required changes (new tables, column changes, migrations).
DONE WHEN: All gaps documented, migration plan clear.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Add PRD env vars to platform/env.ts
description:
Add environment variables for PRD features.
Needed: STRIPE_PRICE_ID (subscription price), STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (if not exists), ONBOARDING_SESSION_TTL_HOURS (default 24), WIN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_DAY (default 3), APP_URL (for Stripe redirects).
FILES: MODIFY platform/env.ts. Use @t3-oss/env-core. NEVER process.env.
DONE WHEN: All vars defined with validation, defaults where appropriate.
BUILD ORDER: Step 4 (env).

title: Build content provider (providers/content.ts)
description:
Load all course markdown at server startup into in-memory Map keyed by course_id/class_id.
PRD Section 7. TYPE: CourseClass { id, courseId, title, videoUrl, duration, order, type (theory|practical), skillName?, timeNudge?, content, keyTakeaways }.
Parses markdown frontmatter. Reads from content/courses/. Cache invalidation on deploy only. Must load content/redirects.json for class_id stability.
FILES: CREATE providers/content.ts, CREATE providers/content.test.ts.
DONE WHEN: All course content loadable, type-safe, searchable by id. Tests cover loading, lookup, redirects.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code — provider).

title: Build onboarding session service
description:
Onboarding session management: anonymous sessions before account creation.
PRD Section 2 + Prerequisite #3.
FEATURES: Create session (UUID + HttpOnly cookie), persist step data (JSONB), resume at last completed step, consume session on account creation (→ onboardingProfiles), garbage-collect expired sessions.
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/session.ts, CREATE features/onboarding/session.test.ts.
IMPORTS: onboardingSessions + onboardingProfiles from platform/db/schema.ts, throwError from platform/errors.ts.
DONE WHEN: Create/read/update/consume/expire sessions. Tests cover all flows.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).

title: Build Stripe subscription checkout flow
description:
Update Stripe for subscription mode (PRD F4, Section 8).
CHANGES: mode:'payment' → mode:'subscription'. Checkout: customer_email pre-filled from onboarding, success_url → account creation, cancel_url → paywall.
WEBHOOKS: checkout.session.completed → create subscription (user_id null initially), customer.subscription.updated → update status, customer.subscription.deleted → mark cancelled.
PRD Prerequisite #4: on account creation, find subscription by email → set userId.
FILES: MODIFY providers/payments.ts, MODIFY webhook handler.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Subscription created on checkout, webhook handles all events, email-based linkage works. 7-day refund window tracked via created_at.

title: Build progress tracking service
description:
Class-level, course_id-scoped progress tracking, no hard sequential gates.
PRD Section 3 Flow 1, Feature F2.
FEATURES: Mark class complete (user_id, class_id, course_id, completed_at), get progress for user, get progress per module, calculate overall %, determine current class. No hard gates. Soft time nudge text from module metadata.
FILES: CREATE features/course/progress.ts, CREATE features/course/progress.test.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: CRUD on progress, % calculations correct, no hard gates, API < 200ms.

title: Build Wins Board feature
description:
Write wins + public anonymous feed (PRD F5, P0). Must-build per JTBD.
WRITE: life_area select, description max 280 chars plain text, rate limit 3/day/user.
PUBLIC FEED: Anonymous, sorted by created_at desc, timestamps rounded to nearest hour, filterable by life_area. Visible to ALL including anonymous.
MY WINS: Private page showing user's own wins.
EMPTY STATE: 5-10 seeded wins (is_seed=true, 'Founding wins' tag, removed after 20+ real).
XSS: PLAIN TEXT only. Test: <script>alert(1)</script> renders escaped.
FILES: CREATE features/wins/wins.ts, wins.test.ts, routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Write + public feed + My Wins + empty state + rate limit + XSS test pass.

title: Build first-module-free gating logic
description:
Module 1 free for all, Modules 2-9 require subscription (PRD F3, P0).
PRD Prerequisite #5: route-level logic checking course_id against access tier (not role-based).
Free users → Module 1 content + practical class. Modules 2-9 locked with 'Upgrade to unlock'. Paid → all.
Check subscription status (active) not just role.
FILES: CREATE features/course/access.ts, access.test.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Free/paid/expired states all handled correctly. Tests cover all states.

title: Build onboarding API routes
description:
API routes for interactive onboarding (PRD F1, P0). 6 steps, one question per screen.
ROUTES: POST /api/onboarding/start, GET /api/onboarding/session, PUT /api/onboarding/step/:step, POST /api/onboarding/complete, DELETE /api/onboarding/session (cleanup).
All via success(). Validation via @hono/zod-validator.
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/routes.ts, routes.test.ts. Wire into platform/server/routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: All routes work, session persists across steps, validation rejects bad input.

title: Build account creation with subscription linkage
description:
Update account creation to link Stripe subscription + consume onboarding session.
PRD Section 3 Flow 0 steps 3-5.
ON CREATE: (1) find subscription by email → set userId, (2) consume onboarding_session → write to onboardingProfiles → delete session, (3) show rich profile screen.
ERROR CASES: email exists → prompt login, webhook delay → polling with fallback.
FILES: MODIFY platform/auth/, CREATE features/onboarding/link-subscription.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: New account gets subscription + onboarding profile automatically.

title: Build progress tracking API routes
description:
API routes for progress tracking.
ROUTES: POST /api/progress/complete, GET /api/progress, GET /api/progress/:courseId.
All require auth. Validation via zod-validator. Responses via success().
FILES: CREATE features/course/progress-routes.ts, wire into routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Routes work, auth required, progress persists.

title: Add onboardingSessions table to schema
description:
Add onboardingSessions temporary table to platform/db/schema.ts.
Stores anonymous pre-account onboarding data (PRD Section 1, Prerequisite #3).
SCHEMA: id UUID PK, session_data JSONB (throughline_q1-q3, throughline_named, email), current_step integer (1-6), created_at datetime, expires_at datetime (garbage-collected daily).
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts. Use Drizzle pgTable with uuid, jsonb, integer, timestamp.
DONE WHEN: Table in schema, Zod auto-generated, migration runs, expires_at defaults to +24h.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Build course player with markdown rendering
description:
Render markdown content with video embeds (PRD F2, P0).
CLASS VIEW: Video player (embedded) + text summary + 'Mark complete' button.
PRACTICAL CLASS: warm amber bg (#F2EDE6), 'Exercise: [Phase Name]' header, instruction card, 'Open Claude Cowork' info, 'I've completed this exercise' button with celebration micro-moment.
NAV: Sequential (next class) + reference (module index sidebar). Content from providers/content.ts.
FILES: UPDATE features/course/, CREATE class-view.tsx, practical-class.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6+8.
acceptance_criteria: Theory + practical render, video embeds work, mark complete works, both navs work.

title: Build course dashboard with 3 states
description:
3 dashboard states per PRD Section 3 Flow 1.
A (0%): Decision Anchor, 'Begin Module 1', Quick Start (paid), locked 2-9.
B (mid): Decision Anchor, 'Continue: [class]', checkmarks, progress bar, wins badge.
C (100%): Decision Anchor + 'complete' badge, 'Write a win', full nav, search.
DECISION ANCHOR: sticky bar, warm cream bg, throughline in Instrument Serif. Mobile: collapsible.
FILES: CREATE features/course/dashboard.tsx, decision-anchor.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8 (pages).
acceptance_criteria: All 3 states render based on progress data.

title: Build soft paywall page
description:
Soft paywall after onboarding (PRD F6, P0).
SPEC: 'You've named your decision. Now let's make it happen.' Decision Anchor card with throughline_named. Gold button '$197/year' + '7-day money-back guarantee'. Secondary 'No thanks, Module 1 for free'.
DESIGN: decisions/design.md. Ethereal Warmth. Instrument Serif.
FILES: CREATE pages/paywall.tsx (max 20 lines), CREATE features/paywall/paywall-screen.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: Renders with personalized throughline, both CTAs work. Conversion trackable.

title: Build navigation states
description:
Nav varies by user state (PRD F6.5, P0).
Anonymous: Logo, Wins Board (public), Login, Get Started.
Free: Logo, Course (Module 1), Wins Board, Upgrade, Account.
Paid: Logo, Course (all), Wins Board, My Wins, Account.
Admin: All + Admin.
FILES: UPDATE shared nav component. Check subscription status.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: Nav correct for all 4 states. Tests verify each.

title: Build Quick Start path
description:
Quick Start for paid users (PRD F6.6, P0).
After onboarding: 'Start Module 1' (default) + 'Quick Start: go to your first exercise' (→ Module 1, Class 4 practical). Free users only see Module 1 option.
FILES: UPDATE features/course/dashboard.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: Quick Start visible for paid only, links to correct practical class.

title: Build soft time nudges
description:
Suggested timelines between modules (PRD F7, P0).
Each module's last class shows time_nudge from content metadata. No hard gates. User can proceed immediately.
Source: time_nudge field in class markdown frontmatter via providers/content.ts.
FILES: UPDATE features/course/class-view.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6+8.
acceptance_criteria: Nudge displays between modules, dismissable, no blocking.

title: Build rich profile completion screen
description:
Post-purchase profile: name, age range, life areas, tried before, time stuck (PRD Section 2).
Skip button ('I'll do this later'). Saves to onboardingProfiles (updates from session data).
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/rich-profile.tsx, UPDATE onboarding routes.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: Shows post-purchase, all fields save, skip works.

title: Build onboarding UI pages
description:
6-step interactive onboarding frontend (PRD Section 2, F1).
1. Welcome card (no progress). 2. Video + intro (2/6). 3. 'What avoided?' (3/6). 4. 'One change in 90 days?' (4/6). 5. 'What decision?' + synthesis (5/6). 6. Email + paywall (6/6).
RULES: One question/screen, back nav (except 6), explicit Continue, mobile full-width, 16px min.
FILES: CREATE pages/onboarding.tsx (max 20 lines), CREATE features/onboarding/steps/.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 steps, session persistence, back nav, mobile responsive.

title: Build Wins Board UI pages
description:
Public feed + write form + My Wins pages (PRD Section 3 Flow 3).
PUBLIC: grid/list of anonymous wins, life_area badges, timestamps rounded. Accessible to anonymous visitors.
WRITE: life_area dropdown, 280-char textarea with counter.
MY WINS: private list.
DESIGN: decisions/design.md. Warm cream palette.
FILES: CREATE pages/wins.tsx, features/wins/public-feed.tsx, write-win.tsx, my-wins.tsx.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: All views render, form validates, feed loads for anonymous users.

title: Seed Wins Board with founder wins
description:
5-10 real wins from Henry and Indy (PRD Section 3 Flow 3 Launch Sequence — NOT optional).
is_seed=true. 'Founding wins' tag, removed after 20+ real wins. Context-based: 'I have clarity on...' not 'I completed Phase 1.' Cover all 4 life areas.
FILES: CREATE/UPDATE platform/db/seed.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 7 (content).
acceptance_criteria: 5-10 wins seeded, is_seed=true, content reviewed by Indy.

title: Add onboardingProfiles table to schema
description:
Add onboardingProfiles table to platform/db/schema.ts.
Stores throughline questions + ICP intelligence data (PRD Section 5).
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id (unique), throughline_q1 text, throughline_q2 text, throughline_q3 text, throughline_named text, age_range text, life_areas text[], tried_before text[], time_stuck text, completed_at datetime, created_at, updated_at.
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts.
DONE WHEN: Table defined, FK + unique on user_id, arrays work, migration generated.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Create content/redirects.json
description:
Class_id stability map (PRD Section 7). Maps old IDs to new on rename.
Start empty: {}. providers/content.ts resolves progress IDs through this before querying.
FILES: CREATE content/redirects.json, UPDATE providers/content.ts to use it.
BUILD ORDER: Step 7.
acceptance_criteria: File exists, content provider resolves through redirect map.

title: Wire all routes into platform/server/routes.ts
description:
Connect all new feature routes for AppRoutes type inference.
ROUTES: onboarding, progress, wins, course, bookmarks (P1), search (P1).
Route chains must be connected (.route()) for Hono AppRoutes.
FILES: MODIFY platform/server/routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8 (final wiring).
acceptance_criteria: All routes accessible, AppRoutes type complete, bun run check passes.

title: End-to-end flow testing
description:
Integration tests for 4 main flows (PRD Section 3).
FLOW 0: Payment → account → subscription linkage → dashboard.
FLOW 1: Course consumption — sequential + reference nav.
FLOW 2: AI skill marking — practical class → mark complete.
FLOW 3: Win writing — form → public feed → My Wins.
FLOW 4: First-module-free → upgrade → preserved progress.
Plus: session resume, expired session, rate limiting.
FILES: CREATE tests/flows/ with per-flow test files.
BUILD ORDER: Step 5 (tests).
acceptance_criteria: All flows tested, edge cases covered.

title: Build course search (P1)
description:
Full-text search across class titles and summaries (PRD F9, P1).
Searches in-memory content Map. Paid see all, free see Module 1 only. < 500ms.
FILES: CREATE features/course/search.ts, search.test.ts, add route.
DONE WHEN: Relevant results, respects access tier, links to class.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6.

title: Build bookmarks feature (P1)
description:
Bookmark toggle on each class + bookmarks page (PRD F10, P1).
Toggle, list, remove. Uses bookmarks table.
FILES: CREATE features/course/bookmarks.ts, bookmarks.test.ts, routes, UI.
DONE WHEN: Toggle works, page lists saved, remove works.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6.

title: Build email reminders (P1)
description:
Automated transactional emails (PRD F8, P1).
TRIGGERS: 7-day inactivity, module completion, abandoned onboarding (email captured).
Max 1 email/week/trigger. Unsubscribe works.
FILES: CREATE features/email/reminders.ts, UPDATE providers/email.ts.
DONE WHEN: All triggers send correctly, unsubscribe works, rate limited.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6.

title: Add wins table to schema
description:
Add wins table to platform/db/schema.ts for Wins Board (PRD F5, P0).
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id, life_area text (health/relationships/career/money), description text (max 280 chars, PLAIN TEXT only — no markdown parsing per PRD Section 8 XSS), is_seed boolean (default false), created_at datetime.
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts.
DONE WHEN: Table defined, 280 char constraint, is_seed defaults false, migration runs.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Add bookmarks table to schema
description:
Add bookmarks table to platform/db/schema.ts (PRD F10, P1).
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id, class_id text (markdown file path), created_at datetime. Unique constraint on (user_id, class_id).
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts.
DONE WHEN: Table defined, unique constraint, migration generated.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Migrate courseProgress to PRD data model
description:
Update courseProgress: moduleId (integer 1-7) → class_id (string) + course_id (string).
PRD Prerequisite #2. class_id maps to markdown file paths (e.g. 'module-01/class-02'). course_id scopes access (e.g. 'full-course').
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts, UPDATE all queries referencing moduleId.
DONE WHEN: New columns in place, old moduleId removed, all references updated, migration handles existing data.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Migrate purchases to subscriptions model
description:
Replace/update purchases table with subscriptions for Stripe recurring billing.
PRD Prerequisite #1: mode:'payment' → mode:'subscription' for $197/year.
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id (NULLABLE — webhook fires before account creation), stripe_customer_id text, stripe_subscription_id text (unique), status text (active/past_due/cancelled), current_period_end datetime, created_at, updated_at.
PRD Prerequisite #4: user_id nullable, linked post-account-creation by email match.
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts, MODIFY providers/payments.ts.
DONE WHEN: subscriptions table created, user_id nullable, old purchases refs updated.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Run schema migrations
description:
Generate and run all Drizzle migrations for new/updated tables.
COMMANDS: bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate.
FILES: platform/db/migrations/ (auto-generated).
DONE WHEN: All 7 entities exist in DB (User, OnboardingSession, OnboardingProfile, Subscription, CourseProgress, Bookmark, Win). Migration runs clean.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).

title: Add PRD error codes to platform/errors.ts
description:
Add error codes for PRD features using throwError().
Needed: ONBOARDING_SESSION_EXPIRED, ONBOARDING_SESSION_NOT_FOUND, ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE, WIN_RATE_LIMITED (3/day), WIN_TOO_LONG (280 chars), SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED, SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, MODULE_LOCKED, BOOKMARK_DUPLICATE, CLASS_NOT_FOUND, COURSE_NOT_FOUND.
FILES: MODIFY platform/errors.ts. Follow existing pattern.
DONE WHEN: All error codes defined, throwError() usable for each.
BUILD ORDER: Step 3 (errors).
